The team is preparing a GB trial-demand campaign. It will promote B2B workflow automation platform in mid-market SaaS operations teams across United Kingdom and Ireland. The product is B2B workflow automation platform. The market is Mid-market SaaS operations teams. Locale is GB. Geographies include United Kingdom and Ireland.

The focus is software and professional services organizations with 1000+ employees; industries include Software and Professional services; company size is 1000+. The people we need are Revenue Operations Manager and Marketing Operations Director in Marketing, Sales, or Operations, at VP or Director level. Titles include Revenue Operations Manager and Marketing Operations Director. Functions include Marketing, Sales, and Operations. Seniorities are Director and VP.

They are researching workflow automation and revenue operations because manual handoffs and slow lead follow-up worsen under CRM migration and pipeline conversion pressure. Keywords include workflow automation and revenue operations. Pains include manual handoffs and slow lead follow-up. Triggers include CRM migration and pipeline conversion pressure. Campaign goal is Trial demand. Preferred channels include linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
